h-title: font-family: var(--display); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--black); letter-spacing: -0.4px;
card-bio: color: var(--canvas); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; opacity: 0.9; margin-top: 2px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--mist); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; font-family: var(--display); letter-spacing: 0.2px;
